title: Mentoring
distinction: A mentor gives advice — they can say 'I wouldn't do that' from lived experience. This is different from coaching.

find.title: Find a Mentor
find.subtitle: Guidance from someone who has navigated similar terrain. They can give you their honest take.
find.empty: No mentor profiles match your filters.

profile.whatCanOffer: What you can offer (judgment, navigation, honest perspective)

request.inflectionPoint: Describe the inflection point you're at
request.inflectionPointPlaceholder: What life/work transition are you navigating?
request.guidanceSought: What kind of guidance are you seeking?
request.guidanceSoughtPlaceholder: What kind of guidance are you looking for?

relationship.setArc: Set arc length and check-in rhythm

midArc.title: Mid-arc reflection
midArc.prompt: What is working in this relationship? What are you avoiding? What would a more honest version of this look like?

postArc.title: Post-arc reflection
postArc.prompt: What shifted? What did you each bring? What would you tell someone entering a mentoring relationship?

feedback.publicNote: This reflection will be visible on the relationship record.

myRequests.title: My Mentoring Requests
myRequests.subtitle: Your pending mentoring requests. Withdraw a request if it is no longer needed.
myRequests.empty: You have no pending mentoring requests.

requests.incomingSubtitle: Open requests from changemakers seeking mentoring. Accept a request to start a relationship.
requests.incomingEmpty: No open mentoring requests right now.

profileForm.whatCanOfferHint: Describe what you bring — this is not a rating, it is an invitation.

relationshipList.closedReflectionPrompt: This arc is closed. Writing a reflection helps you integrate what you received — it is not a rating.
relationshipList.subtitle: Track your active and past mentoring connections.

overview.carryTitle: What do you carry that someone else needs?
overview.carryBody: If you've navigated a difficult transition — career, movement, leadership, loss — your experience is of real value.
overview.browseDescription: Find mentors by domain and experience. Connection begins with curiosity, not a match algorithm.
overview.relationshipsDescription: Track active and completed mentoring arcs. Reflect at mid-arc and close.
overview.myRequestsDescription: View and withdraw your pending mentoring requests.
overview.incomingRequestsDescription: Browse open mentoring requests and accept them as a mentor.
howItems: Mentors set a max concurrent relationship cap — respected automatically
No public ratings. Reflections stay on the relationship record, not the profile
Mentors in RESTING or REFLECTING availability are not shown in browse
Either party can close a relationship; the mentee is invited to reflect
